hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.kt|*.kts) ktfmt --kotlinlang-style "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */res/values*/strings.xml) ./scripts/check_i18n_consistency.sh || echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"i18n consistency check failed! Keys mismatch across locale files. Fix before continuing."}' ;; esac; }
